title: Rotate tokens cli (Security)
summary: Rotate tokens cli — security workflow walkthrough.

content.text:
## Goal

Demonstrate "rotate tokens (cli)" against the Tinybox security surface end to end.

## Walkthrough

# Step 1 — prepare a bucket for the security workflow.
tinybox buckets create my-bucket --region us-east-1
Apply the recipe; verify with the API reference under [API reference](/docs/api/buckets/get).
